message: Add ECU balance and phase/waiting indicator to train card
Prominent cash display, phase badges, and movement progress bar
Fix post-commit hook and increase recent updates to 20 commits
Client sends all ferry edges in commitBuild payload and fix building from ferry ports
Fix ferry crossing not consuming movement when traversing already-owned ferries
Add post-commit hook to auto-regenerate commits.json
Immediate card animation at game start and after discard
Fix demand card highlight persistence across turns and deliveries
Persistent train card rendering during other players' turns
Persistent demand card rendering during other players' turns
Pre-generate commits.json for Render deploy (shallow clone fix)
Various lobby screen improvements
Fix derailment/gale events to randomly drop loads and zero movement budget
Add 15% long-route demand cards and backlog discard pile reshuffle
Add manual zoom in/out buttons to bottom-left of map
Fix lobby player colors to match rail line colors
Fix 5 AI paralysis bugs: stale targets, skippable actions, path walking
Fix AI discontinuous track building and stuck deploy loop
Phase 3 Steps 2-3: Add aiState and implement Easy AI core strategy module
Phase 3 Step 1: Extract action handlers into server/ai-actions.js
